who: HR leaders in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee productivity reports/month
offer: For HR leaders in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee productivity reports/month, unclear performance metrics cause inefficient resource allocation. We provide actionable insights instead of manual analysis of productivity reports.
problem: Lack of actionable insights from employee productivity data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR leaders seeking help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to HR leaders with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for HR leaders
try_it: Let users try data visualization of productivity metrics
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing productivity data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
